steps.title: Use the intercept shortcut
steps.content: The graph asks for the $y$-intercept written as $(0,y)$. Since the first coordinate is $0$, look where the exponential graph crosses the $y$-axis.

steps.title: Read the y-axis point
steps.content: The curve intersects the $y$-axis at $(0,3)$. The problem asks for the value of $y$ in $(0,y)$, so $y=3$.
